exercises.title: Med Ball Rotational Throw
exercises.summary: Explosive hip and trunk rotation for punches, elbows, and kick returns.

exercises.title: Landmine Punch Press
exercises.summary: Split-stance pressing pattern that links foot pressure, hip turn, and shoulder drive.

exercises.title: Plyo Push-Up
exercises.summary: Upper-body explosiveness and elastic stiffness for punching bursts.

exercises.title: Lateral Bound And Stick
exercises.summary: Lateral power with a controlled landing for exits, angle changes, and ring cutting.

exercises.title: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.summary: Hip snap and posterior-chain endurance for kicks, knees, and late-round power.

exercises.title: Band-Resisted Knee Drive
exercises.summary: Explosive knee mechanics with hip extension and trunk posture.
cues: Drive the knee through the band.

exercises.title: Sled Push Interval
exercises.summary: Forward pressure conditioning for clinch entries, ring cutting, and heavy rounds.

exercises.title: Towel Grip Row
exercises.summary: Grip and pulling endurance for collar ties, frames, and hand fighting.

exercises.title: Copenhagen Plank
exercises.summary: Adductor and hip durability for checking, kicking, clinch balance, and sweeps.

exercises.title: Jump Rope Sprint
exercises.summary: Fast foot rhythm and repeat sprint conditioning without heavy joint cost.

exercises.title: Hip Switch Mobility Flow
exercises.summary: Controlled hip rotation and stance switching for kicks, checks, and angle changes.
cues: Own the end range before switching.

pathways.title: Uppercut Power Circuit
pathways.summary: A short power route for uppercuts, hooks, and counter-rotation mechanics.
pathways.goal: Build rotational snap and shoulder pop for uppercuts and hooks.
pathways.notes: Keep every rep crisp. Stop the round if the throws slow down.

pathways.title: Low Kick Spring Circuit
pathways.summary: Lower-body spring and hip control for low-kick return, stance recovery, and angle changes.
pathways.goal: Build hip snap and landing control for kicking and checking.
pathways.notes: The landing matters as much as the jump.

pathways.title: Clinch Engine Round
pathways.summary: Grip, posture, and forward-pressure conditioning for hand fighting and clinch control.
pathways.goal: Build the grip and engine to keep posture while entering knees.
pathways.notes: Treat the sled push like a pressure entry, not a race.

pathways.title: Ring Cutting Conditioning
pathways.summary: Footwork and pressure conditioning for cutting exits without chasing.
pathways.goal: Build repeat footwork bursts for cutting the ring.
pathways.notes: Stay light before the push, then own the landing after the bound.

pathways.title: Knee Entry Explosive Set
pathways.summary: Hip drive and posture for knees off hand traps, frames, and pressure entries.
pathways.goal: Build knee drive with enough balance to exit or continue clinching.
pathways.notes: Do not chase speed if posture collapses.
